# 3 min read

> Quick, engaging articles on trending topics you can finish in 3 minutes.

3 min read is an online magazine publishing short-form articles across technology, business, entertainment, culture, lifestyle, gaming, and sports. The site is designed for readers who want to stay informed without the time commitment.

## Content

The site publishes 490+ articles organized by categories and tags.

### Categories

- [Tech](https://www.3minread.com/categories/tech): AI tools, coding tutorials, automation, software, and tech industry news
- [Business](https://www.3minread.com/categories/business): Job hunting, fintech, crypto wallets, productivity tools, and career advice
- [Entertainment](https://www.3minread.com/categories/entertainment): TV shows, movies, streaming, celebrity news, and character guides
- [Culture](https://www.3minread.com/categories/culture): Books, literature, historical content, and cultural trends
- [Lifestyle](https://www.3minread.com/categories/lifestyle): DIY projects, home decor, holiday crafts, recipes, and gardening
- [Gaming](https://www.3minread.com/categories/gaming): Video games, gaming news, and reviews
- [Sports](https://www.3minread.com/categories/sports): Sports news and analysis
- [Random](https://www.3minread.com/categories/random): Miscellaneous topics

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://www.3minread.com/): Latest, featured, and recent articles
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.3minread.com/privacy): Site privacy policy
- [Sitemap](https://www.3minread.com/sitemap.xml): XML sitemap of all pages

## Technical Details

- Built with Next.js 13 and Material UI
- Static site generation with markdown-based content
- Hosted on Vercel / Netlify
